sections.heading: Standard Discount Constraints
sections.content: Sales reps cannot offer more than a 5% discount on standard tier plans without manager approval. For Enterprise plans, a 10% discount is available but ONLY if the customer agrees to a 2-year commitment.

sections.heading: Black Friday Special
sections.content: During the month of November 2026, the company is authorizing an automatic 20% discount on all active software subscriptions using the coupon code BF2026-AUTOWIN. This cannot be combined with any standard or enterprise tier discounts.

sections.heading: Partnership Discounts
sections.content: If a customer is referred by Microsoft or AWS, they are immediately eligible for a flat $500 statement credit. The referral must be verified via the partner portal.
